prompts.text: If you could invite anyone in the world to dinner, who would it be?
Would you like to be famous? In what way?
Before making a call, do you ever rehearse what you're going to say? Why?
What would a perfect day look like for you?
When was the last time you sang to yourself or to someone else?
If you could live to 90 and keep either your mind or body youthful, which would you choose?
Do you have a sense of how you might die?
What are three things we might have in common?
What are you most grateful for right now?
If you could change something about your upbringing, what would it be?
Tell your life story in a few minutes
If you could wake up with a new ability, what would it be?
If you could know the future, what would you want to learn?
What's something you've always wanted to do but haven't yet?
What accomplishment are you most proud of?
What do you value most in a friendship?
What is one of your most meaningful memories?
What is one of your most difficult memories?
If you had one year left, would you change anything about how you live?
What does friendship mean to you?
What role do love and affection play in your life?
Share something you appreciate about me
What was your family like growing up?
How do you feel about your relationship with your mother?
Create three 'we' statements about us
Complete: I wish I had someone to share ____ with
What should I know about you if we became close?
Tell me something you genuinely appreciate about me
Share an embarrassing moment
When did you last cry in front of someone or alone?
Tell me something you already like about me
What is too serious to joke about?
What would you regret not saying if you died tonight?
What would you save from a fire and why?
Whose death would affect you most and why?
Share a personal problem and let your partner reflect back what they heard
